ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server or device */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server or device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server or device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server or device (e.g., data center, office) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the server or device */,
  "in_sync" INTEGER /* Synchronization status of the server or device */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the server or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server or device where the metric was collected */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_details" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server or device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the server or device */,
  "chrony_version" TEXT /* Version of the Chrony time synchronization service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the server details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server or device (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "hardware_specifications" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the server or device */,
  "software_specifications" TEXT /* Software specifications of the server or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view metrics) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server or device where the alert was generated */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the alert (e.g., time synchronization, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being logged */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert (e.g., acknowledge, resolve) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
